master_row.title: Kaluza-Klein Pi Bound
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Dimensional Access Condition] Extra-dimensional modes couple at frequencies: \begin{equation} \omega_{nlm,n'l'm',m_{KK}}^2 = \omega_{nlm}^2 + \omega_{n'l'm'}^2 + \left(\frac{m_{KK}c}{R_{KK}}\right)^2 + 2\lambda_g\sqrt{\omega_{nlm}^2\omega_{n'l'm'}^2}\delta_{ll'}\delta_{mm'} \end{equation} with selection rules preserving angular momentum: \begin{equation} |l - l'| \leq 2, \quad m + m' + m_{KK} \equiv 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{dB}} \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_inputs: π, l, m, m_KK, R_KK, B
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Kaluza-Klein Tower Resonance’: {Kaluza-Klein Tower Resonance} with selection rules preserving angular momentum
master_row.dictionary: Kaluza-Klein Pi Bound — |l - l'| ≤ 2, m + m' + m_KK ≡ 0 pmod2π R_KK/λ_dB
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\unified_field_theory_paper_centerpetal.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
